channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Whales appear in San Francisco Bay; new alerts could protect them
item.description: Climate change drives whales into the bay, where ship strikes are deadly. A new camera system may help ships and ferries avoid collisions.

item.title: Pope urges respect for human dignity in address to Spanish parliament
item.description: In the first papal speech to Spain's legislature, the American pope called for 'moral renewal' in public life and legislatures.

item.title: Could a vibrating belt help prevent bone density loss?
item.description: Over 40 million U.S. adults aged 50+ have low bone density. An FDA-approved wearable vibration device offers a potential solution.

item.title: The red state, blue state divide is real, but it extends beyond politics alone.
item.description: Recent research indicates that ideological sorting involves more than just moving to politically aligned areas.
